summary: Full backend + frontend regression for GlowCamp ecommerce MVP. All 26 pytest backend tests passed. End-to-end public flows (homepage hero/offers, add-to-cart -> checkout -> COD place order -> thank-you -> track-order timeline -> policy pages) verified through Playwright. Admin login + all 7 admin sub-pages load with auth-protected APIs working.

minor.issue: OrderCreate.items has no min_length=1 in Pydantic model; relies on a separate manual check in route (currently returns 400 correctly, but the duplicate validation is fragile).
Server recomputes unit_price/line_total from settings.offers ignoring client values - good - but the client still sends them; consider stripping them from OrderItem on input to avoid drift.
Returns SMTP password and PayPal/Stripe secrets in plain text to any logged-in admin (expected for an admin panel, but consider masking in list view).

ui_bugs.issue: React dev warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' triggered on /admin/reviews. Caused by Emergent dev-instrumentation injecting <span> wrappers around mapped <option> values (e.g. {n} inside <option>). UI still renders, but produces hydration warnings.

issues: Verified 7 of 8 stat keywords on the dashboard (Total Orders, Pending, Delivered, Cancelled, Paid, Revenue, Stock). The word 'Shipped' was not found verbatim - card may use a different label like 'In Transit' or be split. Worth confirming a Shipped card exists since spec says 8 cards.

action_items: (Optional) Confirm Dashboard has a distinct 'Shipped' card - keyword not found in body text.
(Optional) Suppress the <span>-in-<option> dev warning on /admin/reviews by simplifying option content (e.g. use a plain integer rather than a JSX expression that the instrumentation wraps).
Consider adding min_length=1 on OrderCreate.items for cleaner validation responses (422 vs manual 400).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: 415 lines, single-file routing for all 30+ endpoints. Approaching split point (>700 trigger not hit). Consider splitting into routers/admin.py + routers/public.py before adding more features.

server.py: Order email is sent synchronously in the request thread (send_email blocks on SMTP). When SMTP is configured a slow server could time out the POST /orders call. Use a background task (fastapi.BackgroundTasks).
auth.py: JWT_SECRET falls back to 'glowcamp-dev-secret-change-me'. Add a startup assertion that fails fast in production if the env var is unset.

Checkout.jsx: Order subtotal is computed client-side and not re-verified against server response. Already mitigated by server recompute, but the cart should refresh from the server-returned order before navigating to thank-you (it already does via state, OK).
Settings PUT accepts the entire Settings model from the client, including secrets. Add validation that prevents non-admins from ever hitting it (already done via require_admin).
seed_data_creation: Seed runs idempotently on backend startup. Created TEST_ orders/reviews/faqs/gallery during testing - reviews/faqs/gallery test items are deleted by test teardown. TEST_ prefixed orders remain in DB (5 orders) - safe to leave or admin can delete via panel.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all critical APIs. Reusable. Reset of admin/settings announcement is handled at end of testing. Note that the OrderCreate model accepts unit_price/line_total from client but server recomputes from settings.offers - this is by design. Free shipping kicks in at subtotal >= $50.
rca of the issue: No P0/P1 issues to root-cause. All flows functional.
